verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem, fili hominis, vaticinare adversum Gog, et dices :   Hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Ecce ego super te, Gog,  principem capitis Mosoch et Thubal.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֤ה בֶן־אָדָם֙ הִנָּבֵ֣א עַל־גּ֔וֹג וְאָ֣מַרְתָּ֔ כֹּ֥ה אָמַ֖ר אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה הִנְנִ֤י אֵלֶ֙יךָ֙ גּ֔וֹג נְשִׂ֕יא רֹ֖אשׁ מֶ֥שֶׁךְ וְתֻבָֽל׃
verses.king_james: Therefore, thou son of man, prophesy against Gog, and say, Thus saith the Lord God; Behold, I am against thee, O Gog, the chief prince of Meshech and Tubal:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et circumagam te, et educam te,  et ascendere te faciam de lateribus aquilonis,  et adducam te super montes Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשֹׁבַבְתִּ֙יךָ֙ וְשִׁשֵּׁאתִ֔יךָ וְהַעֲלִיתִ֖יךָ מִיַּרְכְּתֵ֣י צָפ֑וֹן וַהֲבִאוֹתִ֖ךָ עַל־הָרֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: And I will turn thee back, and leave but the sixth part of thee, and will cause thee to come up from the north parts, and will bring thee upon the mountains of Israel:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et percutiam arcum tuum in manu sinistra tua,  et sagittas tuas de manu dextera tua dejiciam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִכֵּיתִ֥י קַשְׁתְּךָ֖ מִיַּ֣ד שְׂמֹאולֶ֑ךָ וְחִצֶּ֕יךָ מִיַּ֥ד יְמִינְךָ֖ אַפִּֽיל׃
verses.king_james: And I will smite thy bow out of thy left hand, and will cause thine arrows to fall out of thy right hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super montes Israël cades tu, et omnia agmina tua,  et populi tui qui sunt tecum :  feris, avibus, omnique volatili et bestiis terræ  dedi te ad devorandum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־הָרֵ֨י יִשְׂרָאֵ֜ל תִּפּ֗וֹל אַתָּה֙ וְכׇל־אֲגַפֶּ֔יךָ וְעַמִּ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר אִתָּ֑ךְ לְעֵ֨יט צִפּ֧וֹר כׇּל־כָּנָ֛ף וְחַיַּ֥ת הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה נְתַתִּ֥יךָ לְאׇכְלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt fall upon the mountains of Israel, thou, and all thy bands, and the people that is with thee: I will give thee unto the ravenous birds of every sort, and to the beasts of the field to be devoured.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super faciem agri cades,  quia ego locutus sum,  ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה תִּפּ֑וֹל כִּ֚י אֲנִ֣י דִבַּ֔רְתִּי נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt fall upon the open field: for I have spoken it, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et immittam ignem in Magog,  et in his qui habitant in insulis confidenter :  et scient quia ego Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשִׁלַּחְתִּי־אֵ֣שׁ בְּמָג֔וֹג וּבְיֹשְׁבֵ֥י הָאִיִּ֖ים לָבֶ֑טַח וְיָדְע֖וּ כִּי־אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And I will send a fire on Magog, and among them that dwell carelessly in the isles: and they shall know that I am the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nomen sanctum meum notum faciam in medio populi mei Israël,  et non polluam nomen sanctum meum amplius :  et scient gentes quia ego Dominus, Sanctus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־שֵׁ֨ם קׇדְשִׁ֜י אוֹדִ֗יעַ בְּתוֹךְ֙ עַמִּ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְלֹא־אַחֵ֥ל אֶת־שֵׁם־קׇדְשִׁ֖י ע֑וֹד וְיָדְע֤וּ הַגּוֹיִם֙ כִּֽי־אֲנִ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה קָד֖וֹשׁ בְּיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: So will I make my holy name known in the midst of my people Israel; and I will not let them pollute my holy name any more: and the heathen shall know that I am the Lord, the Holy One in Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce venit, et factum est,  ait Dominus Deus :  hæc est dies de qua locutus sum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֤ה בָאָה֙ וְנִֽהְיָ֔תָה נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה ה֥וּא הַיּ֖וֹם אֲשֶׁ֥ר דִּבַּֽרְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: Behold, it is come, and it is done, saith the Lord God; this is the day whereof I have spoken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et egredientur habitatores de civitatibus Israël,  et succendent et comburent arma,  clypeum et hastas, arcum et sagittas, et baculos manuum et contos :  et succendent ea igni septem annis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽיָצְא֞וּ יֹשְׁבֵ֣י ׀ עָרֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל וּבִעֲר֡וּ וְ֠הִשִּׂ֠יקוּ בְּנֶ֨שֶׁק וּמָגֵ֤ן וְצִנָּה֙ בְּקֶ֣שֶׁת וּבְחִצִּ֔ים וּבְמַקֵּ֥ל יָ֖ד וּבְרֹ֑מַח וּבִעֲר֥וּ בָהֶ֛ם אֵ֖שׁ שֶׁ֥בַע שָׁנִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And they that dwell in the cities of Israel shall go forth, and shall set on fire and burn the weapons, both the shields and the bucklers, the bows and the arrows, and the handstaves, and the spears, and they shall burn them with fire seven years:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non portabunt ligna de regionibus,  neque succident de saltibus :  quoniam arma succendent igni,  et deprædabuntur eos quibus prædæ fuerant,  et diripient vastatores suos,  ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־יִשְׂא֨וּ עֵצִ֜ים מִן־הַשָּׂדֶ֗ה וְלֹ֤א יַחְטְבוּ֙ מִן־הַיְּעָרִ֔ים כִּ֥י בַנֶּ֖שֶׁק יְבַעֲרוּ־אֵ֑שׁ וְשָׁלְל֣וּ אֶת־שֹׁלְלֵיהֶ֗ם וּבָֽזְזוּ֙ אֶת־בֹּ֣זְזֵיהֶ֔ם נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: So that they shall take no wood out of the field, neither cut down any out of the forests; for they shall burn the weapons with fire: and they shall spoil those that spoiled them, and rob those that robbed them, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa :  dabo Gog locum nominatum sepulchrum in Israël,  vallem viatorum ad orientem maris,  quæ obstupescere faciet prætereuntes :  et sepelient ibi Gog, et omnem multitudinem ejus,  et vocabitur vallis multitudinis Gog.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה בַיּ֣וֹם הַה֡וּא אֶתֵּ֣ן לְגוֹג֩ ׀ מְקֽוֹם־שָׁ֨ם קֶ֜בֶר בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל גֵּ֤י הָעֹֽבְרִים֙ קִדְמַ֣ת הַיָּ֔ם וְחֹסֶ֥מֶת הִ֖יא אֶת־הָעֹֽבְרִ֑ים וְקָ֣בְרוּ שָׁ֗ם אֶת־גּוֹג֙ וְאֶת־כׇּל־הֲמוֹנֹ֔ה וְקָ֣רְא֔וּ גֵּ֖יא הֲמ֥וֹן גּֽוֹג׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, that I will give unto Gog a place there of graves in Israel, the valley of the passengers on the east of the sea: and it shall stop the noses of the passengers: and there shall they bury Gog and all his multitude: and they shall call it The valley of Hamon–gog.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sepelient eos domus Israël,  ut mundent terram septem mensibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּקְבָרוּם֙ בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לְמַ֖עַן טַהֵ֣ר אֶת־הָאָ֑רֶץ שִׁבְעָ֖ה חֳדָשִֽׁים׃
verses.king_james: And seven months shall the house of Israel be burying of them, that they may cleanse the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sepeliet autem eum omnis populus terræ :  et erit eis nominata dies in qua glorificatus sum,  ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקָֽבְרוּ֙ כׇּל־עַ֣ם הָאָ֔רֶץ וְהָיָ֥ה לָהֶ֖ם לְשֵׁ֑ם י֚וֹם הִכָּ֣בְדִ֔י נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃
verses.king_james: Yea, all the people of the land shall bury them; and it shall be to them a renown the day that I shall be glorified, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et viros jugiter constituent lustrantes terram,  qui sepeliant et requirant eos qui remanserant super faciem terræ,  ut emundent eam :  post menses autem septem quærere incipient.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַנְשֵׁ֨י תָמִ֤יד יַבְדִּ֙ילוּ֙ עֹבְרִ֣ים בָּאָ֔רֶץ מְקַבְּרִ֣ים אֶת־הָעֹבְרִ֗ים אֶת־הַנּוֹתָרִ֛ים עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הָאָ֖רֶץ לְטַהֲרָ֑הּ מִקְצֵ֥ה שִׁבְעָה־חֳדָשִׁ֖ים יַחְקֹֽרוּ׃
verses.king_james: And they shall sever out men of continual employment, passing through the land to bury with the passengers those that remain upon the face of the earth, to cleanse it: after the end of seven months shall they search.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et circuibunt peragrantes terram :  cumque viderint os hominis, statuent juxta illud titulum,  donec sepeliant illud pollinctores in valle multitudinis Gog.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָבְר֤וּ הָעֹֽבְרִים֙ בָּאָ֔רֶץ וְרָאָה֙ עֶ֣צֶם אָדָ֔ם וּבָנָ֥ה אֶצְל֖וֹ צִיּ֑וּן עַ֣ד קָבְר֤וּ אֹתוֹ֙ הַֽמְקַבְּרִ֔ים אֶל־גֵּ֖יא הֲמ֥וֹן גּֽוֹג׃
verses.king_james: And the passengers that pass through the land, when any seeth a man’s bone, then shall he set up a sign by it, till the buriers have buried it in the valley of Hamon–gog.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nomen autem civitatis Amona :  et mundabunt terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֥ם שֶׁם־עִ֛יר הֲמוֹנָ֖הֿ וְטִהֲר֥וּ הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And also the name of the city shall be Hamonah. Thus shall they cleanse the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu ergo, fili hominis, hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Dic omni volucri, et universis avibus,  cunctisque bestiis agri :  Convenite, properate,  concurrite undique ad victimam meam  quam ego immolo vobis,  victimam grandem super montes Israël,  ut comedatis carnem,  et bibatis sanguinem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֨ה בֶן־אָדָ֜ם כֹּה־אָמַ֣ר ׀ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֗ה אֱמֹר֩ לְצִפּ֨וֹר כׇּל־כָּנָ֜ף וּלְכֹ֣ל ׀ חַיַּ֣ת הַשָּׂדֶ֗ה הִקָּבְצ֤וּ וָבֹ֙אוּ֙ הֵאָסְפ֣וּ מִסָּבִ֔יב עַל־זִבְחִ֗י אֲשֶׁ֨ר אֲנִ֜י זֹבֵ֤חַ לָכֶם֙ זֶ֣בַח גָּד֔וֹל עַ֖ל הָרֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַאֲכַלְתֶּ֥ם בָּשָׂ֖ר וּשְׁתִ֥יתֶם דָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: And, thou son of man, thus saith the Lord God; Speak unto every feathered fowl, and to every beast of the field, Assemble yourselves, and come; gather yourselves on every side to my sacrifice that I do sacrifice for you, even a great sacrifice upon the mountains of Israel, that ye may eat flesh, and drink blood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Carnes fortium comedetis,  et sanguinem principum terræ bibetis :  arietum, et agnorum, et hircorum,  taurorumque et altilium, et pinguium omnium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּשַׂ֤ר גִּבּוֹרִים֙ תֹּאכֵ֔לוּ וְדַם־נְשִׂיאֵ֥י הָאָ֖רֶץ תִּשְׁתּ֑וּ אֵילִ֨ים כָּרִ֤ים וְעַתּוּדִים֙ פָּרִ֔ים מְרִיאֵ֥י בָשָׁ֖ן כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: Ye shall eat the flesh of the mighty, and drink the blood of the princes of the earth, of rams, of lambs, and of goats, of bullocks, all of them fatlings of Bashan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et comedetis adipem in saturitatem,  et bibetis sanguinem in ebrietatem,  de victima quam ego immolabo vobis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲכַלְתֶּם־חֵ֣לֶב לְשׇׂבְעָ֔ה וּשְׁתִ֥יתֶם דָּ֖ם לְשִׁכָּר֑וֹן מִזִּבְחִ֖י אֲשֶׁר־זָבַ֥חְתִּי לָכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And ye shall eat fat till ye be full, and drink blood till ye be drunken, of my sacrifice which I have sacrificed for you.

verses.latin_vulgate: et saturabimini super mensam meam  de equo, et equite forti,  et de universis viris bellatoribus,  ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׂבַעְתֶּ֤ם עַל־שֻׁלְחָנִי֙ ס֣וּס וָרֶ֔כֶב גִּבּ֖וֹר וְכׇל־אִ֣ישׁ מִלְחָמָ֑ה נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thus ye shall be filled at my table with horses and chariots, with mighty men, and with all men of war, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ponam gloriam meam in gentibus :  et videbunt omnes gentes judicium meum quod fecerim,  et manum meam quam posuerim super eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתִּ֥י אֶת־כְּבוֹדִ֖י בַּגּוֹיִ֑ם וְרָא֣וּ כׇל־הַגּוֹיִ֗ם אֶת־מִשְׁפָּטִי֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשִׂ֔יתִי וְאֶת־יָדִ֖י אֲשֶׁר־שַׂ֥מְתִּי בָהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And I will set my glory among the heathen, and all the heathen shall see my judgment that I have executed, and my hand that I have laid upon them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et scient domus Israël quia ego Dominus Deus eorum,  a die illa et deinceps.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָֽדְעוּ֙ בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל כִּ֛י אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵיהֶ֑ם מִן־הַיּ֥וֹם הַה֖וּא וָהָֽלְאָה׃
verses.king_james: So the house of Israel shall know that I am the Lord their God from that day and forward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et scient gentes quoniam in iniquitate sua capta sit domus Israël,  eo quod dereliquerint me,  et absconderim faciem meam ab eis,  et tradiderim eos in manus hostium,  et ceciderint in gladio universi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָדְע֣וּ הַ֠גּוֹיִ֠ם כִּ֣י בַעֲוֺנָ֞ם גָּל֣וּ בֵֽית־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל עַ֚ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר מָעֲלוּ־בִ֔י וָאַסְתִּ֥ר פָּנַ֖י מֵהֶ֑ם וָֽאֶתְּנֵם֙ בְּיַ֣ד צָרֵיהֶ֔ם וַיִּפְּל֥וּ בַחֶ֖רֶב כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: And the heathen shall know that the house of Israel went into captivity for their iniquity: because they trespassed against me, therefore hid I my face from them, and gave them into the hand of their enemies: so fell they all by the sword.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juxta immunditiam eorum et scelus feci eis,  et abscondi faciem meam ab illis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּטֻמְאָתָ֥ם וּכְפִשְׁעֵיהֶ֖ם עָשִׂ֣יתִי אֹתָ֑ם וָאַסְתִּ֥ר פָּנַ֖י מֵהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: According to their uncleanness and according to their transgressions have I done unto them, and hid my face from them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Nunc reducam captivitatem Jacob,  et miserebor omnis domus Israël,  et assumam zelum pro nomine sancto meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה עַתָּ֗ה אָשִׁיב֙ אֶת־(שבית) [שְׁב֣וּת] יַעֲקֹ֔ב וְרִחַמְתִּ֖י כׇּל־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְקִנֵּאתִ֖י לְשֵׁ֥ם קׇדְשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord God; Now will I bring again the captivity of Jacob, and have mercy upon the whole house of Israel, and will be jealous for my holy name;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et portabunt confusionem suam,  et omnem prævaricationem qua prævaricati sunt in me,  cum habitaverint in terra sua confidenter,  neminem formidantes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָשׂוּ֙ אֶת־כְּלִמָּתָ֔ם וְאֶת־כׇּל־מַעֲלָ֖ם אֲשֶׁ֣ר מָעֲלוּ־בִ֑י בְּשִׁבְתָּ֧ם עַל־אַדְמָתָ֛ם לָבֶ֖טַח וְאֵ֥ין מַחֲרִֽיד׃
verses.king_james: After that they have borne their shame, and all their trespasses whereby they have trespassed against me, when they dwelt safely in their land, and none made them afraid.

verses.latin_vulgate: et reduxero eos de populis,  et congregavero de terris inimicorum suorum,  et sanctificatus fuero in eis,  in oculis gentium plurimarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּשׁוֹבְבִ֤י אוֹתָם֙ מִן־הָ֣עַמִּ֔ים וְקִבַּצְתִּ֣י אֹתָ֔ם מֵאַרְצ֖וֹת אֹיְבֵיהֶ֑ם וְנִקְדַּ֣שְׁתִּי בָ֔ם לְעֵינֵ֖י הַגּוֹיִ֥ם רַבִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: When I have brought them again from the people, and gathered them out of their enemies’ lands, and am sanctified in them in the sight of many nations;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et scient quia ego Dominus Deus eorum,  eo quod transtulerim eos in nationes,  et congregaverim eos super terram suam,  et non dereliquerim quemquam ex eis ibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָדְע֗וּ כִּ֣י אֲנִ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹ֣הֵיהֶ֔ם בְּהַגְלוֹתִ֤י אֹתָם֙ אֶל־הַגּוֹיִ֔ם וְכִנַּסְתִּ֖ים עַל־אַדְמָתָ֑ם וְלֹא־אוֹתִ֥יר ע֛וֹד מֵהֶ֖ם שָֽׁם׃
verses.king_james: Then shall they know that I am the Lord their God, which caused them to be led into captivity among the heathen: but I have gathered them unto their own land, and have left none of them any more there.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non abscondam ultra faciem meam ab eis,  eo quod effuderim spiritum meum super omnem domum Israël,  ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־אַסְתִּ֥יר ע֛וֹד פָּנַ֖י מֵהֶ֑ם אֲשֶׁ֨ר שָׁפַ֤כְתִּי אֶת־רוּחִי֙ עַל־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Neither will I hide my face any more from them: for I have poured out my spirit upon the house of Israel, saith the Lord God.
